positive: A majestic and ethereal nebula composition featuring crystalline cosmic elements and stylized bioluminescent flora, depicted against a deep void background. The main subject is a central, spiraling vortex of nebular gas, contrasted by sharp, geometrically perfect crystals (like quartz or bismuth). Use a vaporwave aesthetic blended with deep space imagery. Strong, high-contrast lighting emphasizes the crystalline structures and the vibrant, flowing gas clouds. Palette: Deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and glowing emerald green. Composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, designed to wrap cleanly around curved apparel surfaces. Minimal texture, highly vector-graphic feel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of focus, messy, grainy
